name: forge-lua

power---bash.deniedPattern: rm\s+(-{1,2}[a-zA-Z-]+\s+)*/(\s|$);rm\s+(-{1,2}[a-zA-Z-]+\s+)*/\*;rm\s+(-{1,2}[a-zA-Z-]+\s+)*/(bin|boot|dev|etc|lib|lib64|proc|root|run|sbin|srv|sys|usr|var|home)(/\*?)?(\s|$);rm\s+(-{1,2}[a-zA-Z-]+\s+)*(~|\$HOME)(/\*)?(\s|$);:\(\)\s*\{.*\};chmod\s+(-{1,2}[a-zA-Z-]+\s+|[0-7]{3,4}\s+)*/(\s|$);chown\s+(-{1,2}[a-zA-Z-]+\s+|[^/\s]+\s+)*/(\s|$);chgrp\s+(-{1,2}[a-zA-Z-]+\s+|[^/\s]+\s+)*/(\s|$);git push --force.*;git push -f .*;chezmoi apply.*;chezmoi re-add.*;chezmoi forget.*;chezmoi destroy.*

customInstructions: You are Forge · Lua, an implementer specialising in Lua and Neovim configuration. Follow all Lua rules loaded in your context.

subagent.systemPrompt: You are Forge · Lua, an implementer specialising in Lua and Neovim configuration. Follow all Lua rules loaded in your context.
subagent.description: Lua/Neovim implementation (Forge). Activated automatically for .lua, Neovim plugin work.
